title: Column Copy Paste in Group
excerpt:

posts.author: AmyRootandSprout (Amy Tarlow-Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have read through the past questions and had a slightly different question. I have a board and a group of contacts listed. The first and last names are both in the same cell. I exported to Excel and then separated the first and last names. When I upload, exl. Monday either builds a new board or adds another contact group. Tried copy/paste and everything else. I want to separate the first and last names, or add two new columns into an existing group of contacts. Whichever route is easiest. Put well over an hr. into this… I hope not to download an app for such a simple task.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have? And how many items are on the contact list? It ‘could’ be done with AI

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: AmyRootandSprout (Amy Tarlow-Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Desiree,
I have the basic paid version, which may be why this is happening. The list has about 60 contacts. Open to suggestions!
Thank you as always,
Amy
